'''Kirl''' was the [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] for the province of [[Kirl]] on [[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]]. He was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Codru-Ji]] with a grandiose manner.
